title: Test 3min — Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS (~$0.36/ep)
description: Engine A/B test, identical script. Engine: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS preview. NOTE: multi-speaker mode capped at 2 speakers, so rendered per-segment (4 voices: Kore/Charon/Orus/Puck). Cost ~$0.36/episode at full daily cadence.
